verification.target_vocab_notes: コート appears clearly as object
verification.kana_notes: Shows ちゃくました but should be きました for 着ました. Wrong reading entirely - 着る is きる not ちゃく.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, を particle, ました form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action statement. Basic N5 structure with straightforward vocabulary.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error needs correction - 着る reading is wrong

verification.target_vocab_notes: 手紙 appears clearly in sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, とても adverb, na-adjective, です. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple X is Y pattern but uses less common adjective 奇妙 (strange). Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with demonstrative and na-adjective

verification.target_vocab_notes: 手紙 appears as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses に particle, i-adjective, を particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action with adjective modifier. Straightforward N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Clean N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 手紙 appears as topic
verification.grammar_notes: Uses その, は particle, 宛て (addressed to), に particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses 宛て expression which adds complexity. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with addressee expression

verification.target_vocab_notes: 要りません appears as negative polite form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, 何も (nothing), negative form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple negative statement with 何も. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with negative pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 要ります appears in polite form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses が particle, ます form. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very simple need expression. Basic N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: いらない appears in negative form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses もう (anymore), それ, は particle, ない form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple negative with もう. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with negative form

verification.target_vocab_notes: こっち appears in sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Uses なら conditional form (そっちがその手でくるなら - if you're going to do that). なら is N4+ conditional grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Idiomatic expression with conditional. Beyond N5 grammar and conceptually complex.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ conditional なら. Also idiomatic and culturally complex.

verification.target_vocab_notes: こっち appears with の particle
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, は particle, より comparison, i-adjective. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Comparative structure with demonstratives. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with comparison

verification.target_vocab_notes: こっち appears indicating location
verification.grammar_notes: Uses で particle, に particle, ている form, んです explanatory. ている is borderline but acceptable, んです is N5.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses ている and explanatory んです. Mid-level N5 with purpose expression.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with explanatory pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: スプーン appears at sentence start
verification.grammar_notes: Uses と particle (listing), が particle, 要る, どうも. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple listing with need expression. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with listing pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 時々 appears in compound phrase 晴れ時々雨
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, は particle, でしょう presumption. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Weather forecast with でしょう. Uses 時々 in weather context. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with presumptive でしょう

verification.target_vocab_notes: ときどき appears in kana as frequency adverb
verification.grammar_notes: Uses と particle, は particle, frequency adverb, に particle, ます form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple habitual action with frequency adverb. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with frequency adverb

verification.target_vocab_notes: 時々 appears in kanji form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, frequency adverb, を particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past habitual action. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: ときどき appears in kana
verification.grammar_notes: Uses と particle, は particle, frequency adverb, に particle, ます form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple habitual action, identical to example_index 1.
verification.overall_notes: Duplicate of example_index 1. Should be removed or replaced.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ときどき appears in kana
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, frequency adverb, で particle (means), に particle, dictionary form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Habitual action with instrumental で. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: ときどき appears in kana
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, frequency adverb, の particle, ところ, へ particle, に particle, dictionary form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses ところ construction and 遊びに (to visit/play). Mid-level N5 with multiple particles.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with ところ pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 傘 appears as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, を particle, compound verb 置き忘れた (left behind). Compound verbs are N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses compound verb structure. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with compound verb

verification.target_vocab_notes: 傘 appears as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, を particle, ていた past continuous. ている is borderline but acceptable for basic continuous state.
verification.difficulty_notes: Past continuous state. Mid-level N5 with ていた.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with past continuous

verification.target_vocab_notes: 傘 appears as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle (location), を particle, compound verb. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Location with compound verb. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: かさ appears in kana as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, の particle, に particle, を particle, compound verb. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Similar to previous examples with location. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example though repetitive with example_index 2

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 傘 (kasa - umbrella) but sentence uses expression 耳をかさなかった where かさ is part of 貸す (kasu - to lend). The phrase 耳を貸す means 'to lend an ear/listen'. This is not the target vocabulary.
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches but wrong vocabulary word
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, の particle, に particle, を particle, negative past. N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Idiomatic expression 耳を貸す. Complex culturally.
verification.overall_notes: Target vocabulary not present - false match. Uses 貸す not 傘.

verification.target_vocab_notes: かさ appears in kana
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, を particle, ていく compound pattern, negative past. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses compound ていく pattern. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with ていく pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 電話 appears in compound 電話番号
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ええ (yes), じゃあ (then), の particle, を particle, dictionary form, ね particle. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Natural conversational example. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 conversational example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 電話 appears as topic
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, na-adjective, である copula. である is N5 level (written form of だ).
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses である copula which is more formal. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with である

verification.target_vocab_notes: 電話 appears in noun phrase
verification.grammar_notes: Uses 誰 question word, が particle, その, に particle, た form, か embedded question, ている form, ます form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Embedded question with ている. Multiple clauses. Advanced N5.
verification.overall_notes: Complex but appropriate N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: つとめています appears in kana form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle, ています form. ている is borderline but acceptable for ongoing employment state.
verification.difficulty_notes: Employment statement with ている. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 勤めていない appears as negative continuous
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, もう (anymore), には particles, ていない negative continuous. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Negative continuous with もう. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with negative continuous

verification.target_vocab_notes: 勤めています appears in polite continuous form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle, ています form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Employment statement similar to example_index 0. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example though repetitive

verification.target_vocab_notes: 安く appears as adverbial form (cheaply)
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, を particle, く-adverb form, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action with adverb. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with adverbial form

verification.target_vocab_notes: 安く appears as adverbial form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, の, を particle, く-adverb, ました form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action similar to example_index 0. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 安く appears as adverbial form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, この, を particle, く-adverb, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action, very similar to previous examples. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example though repetitive

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 安い (yasui - cheap) but sentence uses やすい as auxiliary adjective suffix (忘れやすい - easy to forget). This is a different usage - やすい suffix means 'easy to/prone to' when attached to verb stems. Not the same as the adjective 安い meaning cheap.
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches but different word usage
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, の particle, を particle, verb stem + やすい auxiliary. This auxiliary やすい is N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses やすい auxiliary adjective. Mid-level N5 but not target meaning.
verification.overall_notes: Wrong usage - やすい auxiliary (easy to) vs 安い adjective (cheap). Different words despite same sound.

verification.target_vocab_notes: Same issue - uses やすい auxiliary suffix (疲れやすい - tire easily) not 安い adjective (cheap). Different words.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses が particle, verb stem + やすい auxiliary, です. N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses やすい auxiliary. Mid-level N5 but wrong vocabulary.
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary - auxiliary やすい not adjective 安い

verification.target_vocab_notes: Same issue - uses やすい auxiliary (疲れやすい) not 安い adjective. Different words.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, verb stem + やすい auxiliary. N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple statement with auxiliary. Straightforward N5 but wrong vocabulary.
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary - auxiliary やすい not adjective 安い

verification.target_vocab_notes: どう appears in かどうか construction (whether or not), but also appears standalone as 'how'
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, は particle, どうか (I wonder), かしら ending. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses かしら feminine wondering particle. Mid-level N5 with uncertainty expression.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with wondering expression

verification.target_vocab_notes: どう appears asking 'how about'
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, です, か question. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very simple suggestion question. Basic N5.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: どう appears in かどうか construction (whether or not)
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, が particle, dictionary form, かどうか (whether or not), である. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses embedded question with かどうか. Multiple clauses. Advanced N5.
verification.overall_notes: Complex but appropriate N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 道 appears as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, i-adjective, を particle, ていった past continuous directional. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses ていく directional compound. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with directional compound

verification.target_vocab_notes: 道 appears as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses を particle, volitional よう form. Basic volitional suggestion is N5.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple volitional suggestion. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with volitional

verification.target_vocab_notes: 道 appears as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses を particle, ます form. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very simple statement. Basic N5.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: バス appears in comparison
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, より comparison, frequency adverb, に particle, ます form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Comparative with frequency adverb 頻繁に. Mid-level N5 vocabulary density.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with comparison

verification.target_vocab_notes: バス appears in comparison with それとも
verification.grammar_notes: Uses て form, ます form, か, それとも (or), で particle, ます form, か. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Alternative question with それとも. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with choice question

verification.target_vocab_notes: バス appears as subject
verification.grammar_notes: Uses そら interjection, が particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple exclamation with そら. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with interjection

verification.target_vocab_notes: クラス appears in sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, と particle, も particle (both), です. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses と...も pattern (both). Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with 'both' pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: クラス appears with の particle
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particles, だ copula, よ particle. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple possessive statement. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: クラス appears as predicate noun
verification.grammar_notes: Uses と particle, は particle, だ copula. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple statement. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: さしました appears as past polite form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses を particle, ました form. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very simple past action. Basic N5.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: さしてん appears in colloquial contracted form (さしている→さしてん)
verification.kana_notes: Shows あふりってない but should be あめふってない for 雨降ってない. The reading shows あふりって which is wrong - should be あめふって.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses なんで (why), ている contracted to てん, の question, ている contracted, ない, よ. Very colloquial but N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Highly colloquial with contractions. Advanced N5 due to casual speech style.
verification.overall_notes: Kana error in 雨降って reading. Very colloquial style may be challenging for beginners.

verification.target_vocab_notes: さす appears in dictionary form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses を particle, dictionary form, question particle. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very simple question. Basic N5.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example
